The Ollama API lives at http://localhost:11434/api/generate — use httpx.post() to call it.
The request body needs three keys: "model" (use the model parameter), "prompt" (use the prompt parameter), and "stream" set to False. Pass them via the json= keyword argument.
After getting the response, call response.json() to parse it, then return data["response"] to extract the model's text.
